'''Oogliths''' were [[Yuuzhan Vong]]-bred [[Fungus/Legends|fungi]]. When immature, the feeder filaments of an ooglith could transmit [[Bacteria/Legends|germs]] into the pores of an individual that could [[Death/Legends|kill]] them. Mature oogliths developed antibacterial enzymes to prevent such an occurrence. Oogliths were [[Shaper caste|shaped]] into [[Ooglith cloaker|cloakers]] and [[Ooglith masquer|masquers]]. [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], while a captive of the Yuuzhan Vong, used the oogliths growing in the [[Nursery]] to conceal weapons for an eventual [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] revolt and escape attempt.<ref name="Traitor" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Traitor]]'' {{1st}}
